report.title: Big British Garden Survey Gardens map
report.description: A map of gardens registered for the Big British Garden Survey. Low precision, NUTS 3 level.
report.query: SELECT #columns# FROM ( SELECT n.id AS nuts_id, COUNT(g.id) AS garden_count FROM locations n JOIN locations g ON St_Intersects(g.boundary_geom, n.boundary_geom) AND g.location_type_id=24469 AND g.deleted=false WHERE n.location_type_id=18062 AND n.deleted=false GROUP BY n.id ) AS agg JOIN locations n ON n.id=agg.nuts_id
